meaning: n.大肆宣扬即将来临而结果未发生之事
examples: Unfortunately, the entire evening was a total nonevent.
The problem is how to dramatize a nonevent.
It's a nonevent for stock markets to swing 15% peak-to-trough every year.
This day will pass as if it were nothing more than the Maya Y2K, the nonevent of the decade.
They found hotel rooms at nonevent ski resorts easy to come by.
